A fully secure, Web3 cloud based operating system.

Experience unparalleled security and anonymity with our Web3 exploration tool, running seamlessly through Tor. Your gateway to a limitless, private digital future.

Claim RevshareBuy Now

Access all your essential apps securely

Our key features

Decentralized Operating System

Synk operates akin to conventional operating systems such as Windows, Ubuntu, Chrome OS, and Android, yet it functions uniquely. This configuration allows secure, anytime, anywhere access, utilizing decentralized technologies to maximize both security and user autonomy.

Highly-Secure OS Environment

At Synk, our goal is to deliver the safest possible work environment. Each application accessible through Synk undergoes strict verification, making it akin to a digital vault that also facilitates interaction with a wide array of applications, thereby creating a secure yet adaptable ecosystem.

How It Works

Synk is based on a server infrastructure. Opening a new application triggers the creation of a new, fully isolated container, which is entirely deleted post-session to ensure maximum privacy and security. Only your data is retained, and each container is designed with specific access permissions to other applications such as your MetaMask wallet, enhancing both functionality and security.

Experience web3 with a level of security never seen before.

Introducing Synk

Experience unmatched security and convenience with Synk, your secure gateway to crypto tools. Our lightweight, browser-based OS ensures that your digital assets are protected from the increasing threats of hacks, scams, and frauds in the crypto world.

Encrypted Remote Instances

Leverage our secure, remote instances to access your essential crypto tools without risk. Each session is fully encrypted, safeguarding your data against unauthorized access and threats such as private key theft and wallet hacking.

Advanced Network Protection

Navigate the web securely with our built-in VPN and Tor services, ensuring your online activities remain private and shielded from potential attackers. Our deep network security measures protect against complex threats, including Man-in-the-Middle attacks.

User-Centric Design

Synk offers a user-friendly interface that minimizes risks like misdirected transactions or lost keys. Manage multiple cryptocurrencies effortlessly, ensuring your digital transactions are both secure and straightforward.

Persistent Data Security

Start with our robust centralized storage solutions and transition smoothly to decentralized storage using IPFS for enhanced speed and security. Your data remains accessible only to you, anywhere, anytime.

Continuous Innovation

With Synk, benefit from ongoing updates and enhancements that keep your OS at the forefront of security technology. From initial token releases to comprehensive security audits and the eventual full decentralization of data, stay updated with every step in our roadmap.

Redefine your digital experience with Synk

Secure Connection

Sign up for free in the pre-alpha phase using most Web3 wallets or a Synk account. Experience a secure and straightforward access to explore all the available features  .

Choose Your Apps from Synk Store

Embrace customization with the Synk App Store. Select apps that meet your needs and configure your workspace to your liking. Complete freedom for a fully personalized experience.

Full Customization of Your Space

Synk allows you to completely customize your OS interface. Change themes, tweak settings, and transform your desktop to reflect your unique style. Create your ideal environment with ease and flair.

Explore and shape your application universe.

Access Your Favorite Apps

Synk brings you the top Web3 and conventional apps, featuring essentials like MetaMask, Telegram, UniSwap, Ledger, Yearn, and Brave..

A Platform Guided by Its Community

Your voice matters at Synk. We are committed to integrating the apps most requested by our community. Participate in shaping our platform by voting for your favorite apps or suggesting new features.
